sql_array: CREATE TABLE ldap_test (id INT, search_result ANY);
INSERT INTO ldap_test (id, search_result) VALUES (1, ldap_search('ldap://localhost', 0, 'c=US', '(cn=John*)', NULL));
UPDATE ldap_test SET search_result = ldap_search('ldap://localhost', 0, 'c=US', '(cn=Jane Doe*)', NULL) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT * FROM ldap_test WHERE search_result IS NOT NULL;
